semanticCore: Sperm-drop, pure water, leaking, or drop
quranicRelevance: The initial sperm-drop of human conception (Nutfah - 'khalaqa al-insana min nutfatin').

keyDerivations.meaning: Sperm-drop, drop of fluid, or seed of life

figurativeOrRareUsages: مِنْ نُطْفَةٍ خَلَقَهُ فَقَدَّرَهُ (80:19): From a sperm-drop He created him and proportioned him.
discardedNoise: Obscure details of leaking leather skins.
summaryEn: The root represents fluid drops, primarily defining the biological seed (Nutfah) that serves as the baseline of human material creation.
summaryAr: يمثل هذا الجذر قطرات الماء الصافي، محدداً القطرة التناسلية الموجدة للبدن البشري (نطفة) كآية على الإيجاد والتقدير.
rawText: نَاطِفٌ A kind of sweetmeat; (Msb;) i. q. قُبَّيْطَى. (S, Msb.) نَطَفٌ Earrings: see a verse cited in art. سجد. نُطْفَةٌ Sperma of a man (S, Msb, K) and of a woman. (Msb.)
